linkList.name: OnClick

table.name: pal_assessment_table
table.detailConfig: this.table({"border":false,"fit":true,"showHeader":true,"emptyText":"请先查询真实数据","pagination":true,"pageSize":10,"currentPage":1,"columns":[{"prop":"name","label":"记录ID","minWidth":"170","align":"center","type":"","columnKey":"","fixed":false},{"prop":"studentId","label":"学号","minWidth":"120","align":"center","type":"","columnKey":"","fixed":false},{"prop":"dept","label":"批次","minWidth":"90","align":"center","type":"","columnKey":"","fixed":false},{"prop":"mentor","label":"导师","minWidth":"90","align":"center","type":"","columnKey":"","fixed":false},{"prop":"professional","label":"专业能力","minWidth":"85","align":"center","type":"","columnKey":"","fixed":false},{"prop":"attitude","label":"工作态度","minWidth":"85","align":"center","type":"","columnKey":"","fixed":false},{"prop":"task","label":"任务完成","minWidth":"85","align":"center","type":"","columnKey":"","fixed":false},{"prop":"score","label":"综合评分","minWidth":"85","align":"center","type":"","columnKey":"","fixed":false},{"prop":"status","label":"状态","minWidth":"118","align":"center","type":"","columnKey":"","fixed":false},{"prop":"updated","label":"更新时间","minWidth":"145","align":"center","type":"","columnKey":"","fixed":false},{"prop":"actions","label":"操作","minWidth":"240","align":"center","type":"","columnKey":"","fixed":false}],"totalData":[]})
table.styleConfig: #domId.PCUI_ElementTable{position:relative!important;background:#fff!important;border:1px solid #e6edf7!important;border-radius:8px!important;box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(15,23,42,.05)!important;margin:8px!important;padding-top:38px!important;height:472px!important;max-height:472px!important;box-sizing:border-box!important;overflow:hidden!important;}#domId.PCUI_ElementTable::before{content:"考核列表  共 128 条";position:absolute;top:12px;left:18px;font-size:15px;font-weight:700;color:#2563eb;border-bottom:3px solid #2563eb;padding-bottom:8px;z-index:2;}#domId .el-table{font-size:12px!important;color:#334155!important;}#domId .el-table__header th,#domId .el-table__header tr{background:#f4f7fb!important;color:#64748b!important;font-weight:700!important;}#domId .el-table__body tr:nth-child(even){background:#fafcff!important;}#domId .el-table__body td{border-color:#edf2f7!important;height:38px!important;}#domId .el-table__body td:nth-child(8) .cell{color:#2563eb!important;font-weight:700!important;}#domId .el-table__body tr:nth-child(-n+4) td:nth-child(9) .cell{display:inline-block;min-width:56px;background:#dcfce7!important;color:#16a34a!important;border-radius:4px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 8px;}#domId .el-table__body tr:nth-child(n+5) td:nth-child(9) .cell{display:inline-block;min-width:56px;background:#ffedd5!important;color:#f97316!important;border-radius:4px;font-weight:700;padding:2px 8px;}#domId .el-table__body td:nth-child(11) .cell{display:inline-block;min-width:185px;background:#eaf3ff!important;border:1px solid #bfdbfe!important;border-radius:3px;color:#2563eb!important;font-weight:700!important;line-height:22px!important;}#domId .el-pagination{position:absolute!important;right:18px!important;top:12px!important;}

linkList.script: var e=arguments[1]||arguments[0]||{}; if(window.__palTableHandleAction){ window.__palTableHandleAction(e); } else { window.__palLastActionError='pal handler not ready'; }

keyword.name: pal_filter_keyword
keyword.detailConfig: options.prepend='关键词';options.placeholder='姓名 / 学号 / 手机号';options.value='';options.clearable=true;options.disabled=false;
